meaning: adj.荳榊ｱ樔ｺ惹ｻｻ菴墓蕗莨夂噪,陲ｫ騾仙倂謨吩ｼ夂噪
examples: Unchurched Harry hates organs and choirs.
The secret of winning unchurched people into the church is really quite simple.
But he officiates willingly, feeling that this is his biggest chance to meet people who are mostly unchurched.
Wideman said research indicates that the unchurched are far more likely to be drawn to a new church than one that already exists.
